query: What are the docket numbers for the filings Google submitted to FERC between June and December 2024?
final_answer:
Google submitted filings in that period with these docket numbers:

- AD24-11-000 (Post-Technical Conference Comments, filed 12/10/2024)  
- ER24-2891-000  
- ER24-2888-000  
- ER24-2890-000  
- ER24-2893-000  
- ER24-2894-000  
- ER24-2889-000  
  (The ER24-series docket numbers are from a doc-less Motion to Intervene filed 09/19/2024.)
